auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Gift Up API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Create or view API keys in the Gift Up dashboard: https://giftup.app/integrations/api-keys.

actions.name: get_company
actions.description: Get the Gift Up company associated with the API key.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting the Gift Up company.

anyOf.description: Whether all onboarding steps are complete.
Whether the checkout has been seen live.

actions.name: get_gift_card
actions.description: Get one Gift Up gift card by code.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Gift Up gift card.

anyOf.description: The message included with the gift card.
The gift card recipient email address.
The gift card balance backing type.
Whether the gift card can be redeemed.
Whether the gift card has expired.
Whether the gift card is not yet valid.
Whether the gift card is voided.
The datetime when the gift card was fulfilled.
The datetime when the gift card expires.
The datetime when the gift card becomes valid.
The datetime when the gift card was voided.
The terms captured when the gift card was created.
The private SKU associated with the gift card item.

ledger.description: The ledger events for the gift card.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up gift card response.

actions.name: get_item
actions.description: Get one Gift Up item by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Gift Up item.

anyOf.description: The currency balance issued by this item.
The unit balance issued by this item.
The datetime when the item becomes available.
The datetime when the item stops being available.

actions.name: get_order
actions.description: Get one Gift Up order by ID or order number.

id.description: The Gift Up order ID or order number.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Gift Up order.

anyOf.description: The datetime when the order was created.

promotions.description: The promotions applied to the order.

customFields.description: The custom fields collected for the order.

salesTaxes.description: The sales taxes for the order.

notes.description: The notes added to the order.

fulfilments.description: The fulfillment results for created gift cards.

giftCards.description: The gift cards created by the order.

actions.name: get_report_transaction
actions.description: Get one Gift Up report transaction by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting a Gift Up report transaction.

anyOf.description: The datetime when the transaction event occurred.
The location ID where the transaction event occurred.
The reason recorded for the transaction.
The order ID associated with the transaction.
The Gift Up fee for the transaction.
The name of the user who triggered the event.
The email of the user who triggered the event.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up report transaction response.

actions.name: list_gift_cards
actions.description: List Gift Up gift cards with optional filters.

status.description: Only include gift cards in this state.

createdOnOrAfter.description: Only include gift cards created on or after this datetime. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

updatedOnOrAfter.description: Only include gift cards updated on or after this datetime. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

sku.description: Only include gift cards with this SKU.

recipientEmail.description: Only include gift cards for this recipient email address.

purchaserEmail.description: Only include gift cards for this purchaser email address.

paymentTransactionId.description: Only include gift cards with this payment provider transaction ID.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return.

offset.description: The number of objects to skip.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Gift Up gift cards.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching objects.
Whether Gift Up has more objects after this page.
The offset used for the request.
The limit used for the request.
The message included with the gift card.
The gift card recipient email address.
The gift card balance backing type.
Whether the gift card can be redeemed.
Whether the gift card has expired.
Whether the gift card is not yet valid.
Whether the gift card is voided.
The datetime when the gift card was fulfilled.
The datetime when the gift card expires.
The datetime when the gift card becomes valid.
The datetime when the gift card was voided.
The terms captured when the gift card was created.
The private SKU associated with the gift card item.

ledger.description: The ledger events for the gift card.

giftCards.description: The Gift Up gift cards in this page.

raw.description: The raw Gift Up list response.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up gift card list response.

actions.name: list_items
actions.description: List Gift Up items, optionally filtered by item group.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Gift Up items.

anyOf.description: The currency balance issued by this item.
The unit balance issued by this item.
The datetime when the item becomes available.
The datetime when the item stops being available.

raw.description: The raw Gift Up list response.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up item list response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Gift Up locations.

raw.description: The raw Gift Up list response.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up location list response.

actions.name: list_orders
actions.description: List Gift Up orders with optional filters.

createdOnOrAfter.description: Only include orders created on or after this datetime. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

purchaserEmail.description: Only include orders for this purchaser email address.

source.description: Only include orders from this source.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return.

offset.description: The number of objects to skip.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Gift Up orders.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching objects.
Whether Gift Up has more objects after this page.
The offset used for the request.
The limit used for the request.
The datetime when the order was created.

promotions.description: The promotions applied to the order.

customFields.description: The custom fields collected for the order.

salesTaxes.description: The sales taxes for the order.

notes.description: The notes added to the order.

fulfilments.description: The fulfillment results for created gift cards.

giftCards.description: The gift cards created by the order.

orders.description: The Gift Up orders in this page.

raw.description: The raw Gift Up list response.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up order list response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Gift Up promotions.

anyOf.description: Whether the promotion is used for tracking only.
The datetime when the promotion was published.
The datetime when the promotion was stopped.

raw.description: The raw Gift Up list response.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up promotion list response.

actions.name: list_report_transactions
actions.description: List Gift Up report transactions with optional filters.

eventOccurredOnOrAfter.description: Only include transactions that occurred on or after this datetime. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

eventOccurredOnOrBefore.description: Only include transactions that occurred on or before this datetime. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

events.description: Only include transactions for these Gift Up event types.

items.description: A Gift Up user email address.

users.description: Only include transactions generated by these user email addresses.

locations.description: Only include transactions generated at these location IDs.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

limit.description: The maximum number of objects to return.

offset.description: The number of objects to skip.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Gift Up report transactions.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching objects.
Whether Gift Up has more objects after this page.
The offset used for the request.
The limit used for the request.
The datetime when the transaction event occurred.
The location ID where the transaction event occurred.
The reason recorded for the transaction.
The order ID associated with the transaction.
The Gift Up fee for the transaction.
The name of the user who triggered the event.
The email of the user who triggered the event.

transactions.description: The Gift Up report transactions in this page.

raw.description: The raw Gift Up list response.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up report transaction list response.

actions.name: reactivate_gift_card
actions.description: Reactivate a voided Gift Up gift card.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

reason.description: The reason to record in the Gift Up history log.

locationId.description: The Gift Up location ID where the event occurred.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the Gift Up event.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Gift Up gift card event.

success.description: Whether Gift Up accepted the operation.

actions.name: redeem_gift_card
actions.description: Redeem a currency amount or units from a Gift Up gift card.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

amount.description: The currency amount for a currency-backed gift card.

units.description: The unit quantity for a units-backed gift card.

reason.description: The reason to record in the Gift Up history log.

locationId.description: The Gift Up location ID where the event occurred.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the Gift Up event.

redeemedOn.description: The datetime when the redemption occurred. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Gift Up redemption operation. Provide exactly one of amount or units.

anyOf.description: Whether the transaction was already reversed.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up gift card transaction result.

actions.name: redeem_gift_card_in_full
actions.description: Redeem all remaining balance from a Gift Up gift card.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

reason.description: The reason to record in the Gift Up history log.

locationId.description: The Gift Up location ID where the event occurred.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the Gift Up event.

redeemedOn.description: The datetime when the redemption occurred. Gift Up accepts date or datetime strings.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for redeeming a Gift Up gift card in full.

anyOf.description: Whether the transaction was already reversed.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up gift card transaction result.

actions.name: top_up_gift_card
actions.description: Add currency amount or units to a Gift Up gift card.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

amount.description: The currency amount for a currency-backed gift card.

units.description: The unit quantity for a units-backed gift card.

reason.description: The reason to record in the Gift Up history log.

locationId.description: The Gift Up location ID where the event occurred.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the Gift Up event.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Gift Up top-up operation. Provide exactly one of amount or units.

anyOf.description: Whether the transaction was already reversed.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up gift card transaction result.

actions.name: undo_gift_card_redemption
actions.description: Undo a previous Gift Up gift card redemption transaction.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

reason.description: The reason to record in the Gift Up history log.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the Gift Up event.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for undoing a Gift Up gift card redemption.

anyOf.description: Whether the transaction was already reversed.

outputSchema.description: The Gift Up gift card transaction result.

actions.name: void_gift_card
actions.description: Void a Gift Up gift card so it can no longer be redeemed.

code.description: The Gift Up gift card code.

reason.description: The reason to record in the Gift Up history log.

locationId.description: The Gift Up location ID where the event occurred.

metadata.description: Metadata key-value pairs to attach to the Gift Up event.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for a Gift Up gift card event.

success.description: Whether Gift Up accepted the operation.
